name: faculty_by_department
SQL: CREATE VIEW faculty_by_department AS SELECT FacID, DNO FROM Member_of;

name: course_enrollment
SQL: CREATE VIEW course_enrollment AS SELECT CID, DNO FROM Course;

name: faculty_course_ratio
SQL: CREATE VIEW faculty_course_ratio AS SELECT DNO, COUNT(FacID) / COUNT(DISTINCT CID) as FACtoCourseRatio FROM Member_of JOIN Course ON Member_of.FacID = Course.Instructor GROUP BY DNO;

name: faculty_rank
SQL: CREATE VIEW faculty_rank AS SELECT FacID, Rank FROM Faculty;
